purpose: Share materials for investigating why quration open-source build spends a long time in opt/compile for grouped 4th(new_2) step circuits.
main_findings: Both H3 and H4 complete successfully with qret compile.
Wall-clock time is dominated by qret opt, not qret compile.
Within qret opt, ir::decompose_inst is the largest cost and ir::recursive_inliner is the second-largest cost.
